finding_results.notes: Removed the narrator's self-labeling schema for what works, what fails, and when the Friday turn begins. Recast those transitions through Simone's changed prompts, notebook behavior, Doug hearing himself go generic, and the Friday light/fatigue shift. finding_results.summary: The chapter now lets scene behavior and Doug's sensory attention carry the progression from live material to dead material to the shampoo trust-turn without announcing the chapter's own schema.

summary: Revised chapter 11 to remove explanatory transition labels, preserve the live/dead material contrast through scene texture, and keep the Friday shampoo confession as the clear trust-turn.
